visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two men stand next to a red Tesla Model Y in an outdoor parking area with a stone wall background. A man in a red t-shirt and black pants gestures toward the car's hood while speaking to a man in a black t-shirt and light blue jeans. The lighting is bright and natural, casting clear shadows on the pavement. (2) A woman wearing a white short-sleeved dress approaches the vehicle and enters the rear passenger door. The men remain outside, watching her get in. The camera captures her full profile and movements. (3) The scene shifts to the interior of the car, highlighting the stark white vegan leather seats. A hand reaches in to adjust a seat or point out a feature. (4) The woman sits in the front passenger seat while the man in the red shirt occupies the driver's seat. A man in a black shirt leans in through the open window to talk. The dashboard features a clean, minimalist design with a central touchscreen. (5) In the rear seat, a small screen is visible on the center console, displaying entertainment or car settings. The man and woman interact with the rear screen, pointing at the display. (6) The man in the red shirt holds up a large black mesh sunshade, demonstrating how it fits against the glass roof of the car. He smiles and gestures enthusiastically. (7) The car is seen driving on an asphalt road with green trees and a clear sky in the background. The man in the red shirt is at the steering wheel, and the woman in white is in the passenger seat, wearing a seatbelt. (8) Close-up shots show the characters' reactions while the car is in motion, focusing on their facial expressions—smiling, nodding, and looking around the cabin to experience the ride quality.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這台什麼行頭. [Variety]: Model Y 煥新版. (2) [Subtitle]: 我覺得車頭是不是長得不太一樣. (3) [Subtitle]: 它那個是漫射燈. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且因為舊版沒有這一條. (5) [Subtitle]: 所以你路上看到這一條. [Logo]: EBG-1706. (6) [Subtitle]: 就知道它是新車. (7) [Subtitle]: 你真的很騷. [Variety]: 白內裝. (8) [Subtitle]: 那個時候我一知道有白色可以選. (9) [Subtitle]: 我就決定要白色了. (10) [Subtitle]: 還有電視. (11) [Subtitle]: 最重要的是這個有電視. (12) [Subtitle]: 其實網絡上人家說它是預留那種. (13) [Subtitle]: 未來可以開放自動駕駛. (14) [Subtitle]: 舊版後座沒有螢幕. (15) [Subtitle]: 要加也不行. [Slogan]: 沒有沒得加. (16) [Subtitle]: 我們之前一直笑過的. (17) [Subtitle]: 上面的天窗是手動嗎. (18) [Subtitle]: 原本舊的Model Y是單層的玻璃. (19) [Subtitle]: 現在變雙層玻璃. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以它隔熱也會比較好. (21) [Subtitle]: 但還是要這個. (22) [Subtitle]: 拍謝有點熱. [Variety]: 我裝一下:). (23) [Subtitle]: 我是覺得外面的聲音不會覺得. (24) [Subtitle]: 隔音真的好蠻多的. (25) [Subtitle]: 你有上去開高速公路了嗎. (26) [Subtitle]: 風切聲怎麼樣. (27) [Subtitle]: 完全聽不到風切聲. (28) [Variety]: 喔!!. (29) [Subtitle]: 過窟窿這有好很多吧. (30) [Variety]: 好超多!!. (31) [Subtitle]: 好很多超多了. (32) [Subtitle]: 很舒服啊. (33) [Subtitle]: 我在剛剛才坐完宗翰的車. (34) [Subtitle]: 現在立刻換一台很有感. (35) [Subtitle]: 從地獄到天堂. (36) [Variety]: 有感進步.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male host in red, 1 male guest in black, 1 female guest in white.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character wears a bright red short-sleeved t-shirt and black techwear-style pants. The male guest wears a black oversized t-shirt, a silver chain, sunglasses, and baggy light blue jeans. The female guest wears a white collared mini dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between an outdoor parking area with a stone retaining wall and greenery, and the modern, white-themed interior of a Tesla Model Y. Later, the background shows urban streets and trees through the car windows as it drives.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with two male voices engaged in a fast-paced, enthusiastic conversation. One voice is slightly higher in pitch and more inquisitive, while the other is lower and explanatory. A mid-tempo lo-fi hip-hop track plays consistently in the background with a steady electronic beat. (2) A sharp mechanical thud indicates a car door opening, followed by a light rustling sound. A female voice enters the mix, laughing and expressing surprise with a high arousal level. (3) As the conversation moves inside the car, the acoustic environment shifts to a slightly dampened, enclosed room tone. The voices remain clear, discussing technical features. (4) A soft rustling of fabric or plastic occurs as a sunshade is manipulated. The male voices maintain a humorous and friendly tone. (5) The sound of the car accelerating is accompanied by a subtle increase in low-frequency road hum and a faint wind-like 'whoosh' SFX used as a transition. (6) The voices discuss road noise insulation, with the female speaker's voice sounding bright and positive. The background music continues without interruption, maintaining a consistent vibe until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Detail Walkthrough -> Driving Experience -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle review of the updated Tesla Model Y (煥新版). It highlights key physical changes like the headlight bar, white interior option, rear passenger screen, and improved sound insulation during driving. The intent is to inform potential buyers or fans about the upgrades in a casual, vlog-style format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses heavily on the features of the Tesla Model Y and mentions specific accessories like the JOWUA pillow.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-density subtitles and variety-show style text to maintain engagement, typical of modern short-form social media content.
